values.Description: Sceenz is a modern event management platform built with Next.js, React and React Native. It allows users to discover, register for, and manage events, while providing hosts with analytics and management tools.
values.Tagline: Sceenz is a platform for discovering, registering, and managing local events.
values.Technologies: NextJS, TailwindCSS, React Native, Supabase, Mapbox, Leaflet
values.Title: Sceenz
